4:00 pm show-The Fifth Column 10th Anniversary Show

Fifth Column Podcast

> Website

Kmele Foster co-host of The Fifth Column podcast and the co-founder and executive producer of the media company Freethink. Foster was one of the signatories of the Harper's Letter on justice and open debate, alongside more than 150 people, including Salman Rushdie, J.K. Rowling, and Noam Chomsky. He is an outspoken libertarian critic of cancel culture, the Black Lives Matter movement, and political orthodoxy.

Michael Moynihan American journalist. A former national correspondent for Vice News, he co-hosts The Fifth Column podcast and hosts The Moynihan Report. He was previously the cultural news editor for The Daily Beast, the managing editor of Vice magazine, and a senior editor of the libertarian magazine Reason. He currently produces content for The Free Press.
